description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical wine bottle covered in a coarse, tan burlap fabric that wraps tightly around its body, giving it a rustic appearance. The neck of the bottle is visible at the top, sealed with a reddish wax or foil, and the fabric is cut away to reveal the closure. The front features a white and gold label with the brand name 'Siglo' and 'Rioja' clearly printed, along with additional text and decorative elements. The back side displays a secondary label with barcode and product information, partially visible through the burlap. The bottle stands on a round, wooden or wood-textured base, which is slightly wider than the bottle itself. The overall look is vintage and artisanal, suggesting a specialty or collectible wine bottle.
description: A tall wine bottle wrapped in tan burlap with a wax-sealed neck and a prominent 'Siglo Rioja' label on the front, standing on a round wooden base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main 'Siglo Rioja' label and the burlap wrapping, with the wax-sealed neck exposed.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the seam of the burlap and partial visibility of the back label through the fabric.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the secondary label with barcode and product details, mostly covered by burlap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuous burlap texture and a glimpse of the front label's edge.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label with 'Siglo' in red script, 'Rioja' in gold, and additional text in smaller fonts; secondary label with barcode and product info on the back; both labels are rectangular and placed vertically.
